query: Détecter un scan de ports SYN sur un serveur web

graph_docs.description: Détection d'un scan de ports SYN sur un serveur web
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SYN Scan détecté"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000001; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Scan de ports FTP pour recherche de services ouverts
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 21 (msg:"FTP Port Scan"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 10; sid:1000005; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Scan UDP sur plage de ports pour services exposés
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"UDP Port Scan"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 5; sid:1000029; rev:1;)
alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"XMAS Scan"; flags:FPU; sid:1000046; rev:1;)

entity_context: SEVERITY: medium | PROTOCOL: TCP | ATTACK: Port Scan | SEVERITY: low
response: alert tcp any any -> $LOCALHOST 80 (msg="Syn Scan detected" priority=high)

query: Bloquer une attaque par force brute sur le protocole SSH

graph_docs.description: Tentative de force brute sur authentification LDAP
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 389 (msg:"LDAP Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 30; sid:1000036; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Tentative de connexion SSH par brute force
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 22 (msg:"SSH Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 60; sid:1000003; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Tentative de connexion RDP depuis une IP externe suspecte
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 3389 (msg:"RDP Brute Force"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 30; sid:1000011; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Tentative de connexion SMTP avec authentification répétée
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 25 (msg:"SMTP Auth Brute Force"; content:"AUTH LOGIN"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 60; sid:1000026; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Trafic suspect vers le port Telnet depuis l'extérieur
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 23 (msg:"Telnet Access Suspect"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 30; sid:1000019; rev:1;)

entity_context: SEVERITY: high | ATTACK: Brute Force | PROTOCOL: TCP
response: alert udp any any -> $LOCALHOST 22 (msg="Brute Force Attack on SSH" priority=high)

query: Identifier une injection SQL dans une requête HTTP

graph_docs.description: Injection SQL dans une requête HTTP GET
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SQL Injection GET"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"union+select"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000004; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Injection XSS dans un formulaire HTTP POST
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"XSS Injection"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"<script>"; nocase; http_client_body; sid:1000028; rev:1;)

entity_context: ATTACK: XSS | SEVERITY: critical | SEVERITY: medium | PROTOCOL: TCP | ATTACK: SQL Injection
response: alert tcp any any -> $LOCAL_NETWORK port "56" proto tcp udp check ip source eq "$IP_SOURCE_ADDRESS" protocol == "tcp" and icmp not equal to "" action block comment "[Injection] - Query parameter is vulnerable to SQL injection attack." log detail snort.log level debug priority high timestamp now expire disable timeout 90000 filter outbound deny destination host "*" group policy none

query: Détecter un ransomware qui chiffre des fichiers via SMB

graph_docs.description: Détection d'un ransomware chiffrant les fichiers réseau
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"Ransomware SMB Encryption"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42 25|"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 100, seconds 10; sid:1000040; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Détection d'un ver réseau se propageant via SMB
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"SMB Worm Propagation"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42|"; depth:4; sid:1000021; rev:1;)

entity_context: ATTACK: Ransomware | ATTACK: Worm | PROTOCOL: TCP | SEVERITY: critical
response: alert tcp $SOURCE any -> $TARGET 445 (content:"|FF 53 4D 42 25|" msg="Ransomware SMB Chaining");

query: Repérer une exfiltration de données via le protocole DNS

graph_docs.description: Détection d'exfiltration de données via DNS
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"DNS Data Exfiltration"; content:"TXT"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 10; sid:1000017; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Détection d'exfiltration via protocole ICMP tunneling
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert icmp $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ICMP Tunneling Exfiltration"; itype:8; dsize:>100; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000049; rev:1;)
alert icmp any any -> 255.255.255.255 any (msg:"ICMP Smurf Attack"; itype:8; sid:1000020; rev:1;)

graph_docs.description: Détection d'un DDoS par réflexion NTP
graph_docs.snort_rule: alert udp any 123 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"NTP Reflection DDoS"; content:"|1c|"; depth:1; sid:1000037; rev:1;)
alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET 53 (msg:"DNS Amplification Attack"; content:"|00 00 FF 00 01|"; depth:5; offset:4; sid:1000014; rev:1;)

entity_context: SEVERITY: high | ATTACK: DDoS | ATTACK: Data Exfiltration | PROTOCOL: UDP
response: alert tcp any => * any port 53 protocol dns snort.rule=exfil_data_alert_rule id=1000018 rev=1 timestamp="2023-04-01T00:00:00Z" severity=critical description="Detection of data leakage through DNS traffic." source-port-range=any destination-port-range=any src-dst-type=dns dst-dst-type=network timeout=seconds=10 filter-by-src-count=count(50) filter-by-sid=sid(1000017);
